name: framework
description: Evaluate and improve framework slides — 2x2, Venn, value chain, and conceptual relationship layouts
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with the right framework choice, clean conceptual zoning, and minimal text overload

prompts.text: Build a 2x2 framework slide positioning four product lines by growth potential and implementation complexity
Build a value chain framework slide showing sourcing, manufacturing, distribution, and service with the biggest margin leak highlighted
Build a Venn diagram slide showing the overlap between customer need, data availability, and AI feasibility
Build a framework slide organizing capabilities into strategy, technology, operations, and talent
Build a 2x2 prioritization matrix for ten initiatives by impact and effort, with the quick wins quadrant emphasized
Build a framework slide mapping risks to prevent, detect, respond, and recover control layers
Build a framework slide showing awareness, consideration, purchase, onboarding, and renewal as a connected customer journey value chain
Build a 2x2 portfolio matrix for six business units by profitability and strategic fit
Build a layered framework slide for a data platform with data sources, platform services, analytics products, and governance
Build a framework slide grouping merger synergies into revenue, cost, technology, and operating model buckets
